articles.title: N.H. State Police announce unexpected death of 19-year veteran
articles.description:
“Our hearts are broken by this loss,” New Hampshire State Police said.

The post N.H. State Police announce unexpected death of 19-year veteran appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New Hampshire State Police announced the unexpected death of a 19-year veteran officer.
The officer's passing has deeply affected the New Hampshire law enforcement community.
Boston residents may feel the impact of reduced cross-state collaboration in policing.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown says Celtics showed ‘lack of respect’ after trade to Sixers
articles.description:
"I think Brad [Stevens] is getting a lot of the criticism. I wasn’t thrilled with the way he facilitated some of the conversations.”

The post Jaylen Brown says Celtics showed ‘lack of respect’ after trade to Sixers appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown criticized Celtics for lack of respect during trade talks with Sixers.
Brown expressed dissatisfaction with Brad Stevens' handling of conversations regarding the trade.
Celtics' management decisions may affect fan trust and team dynamics moving forward.
